title: Touchup baseline and rpm tests
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

A few touchups on the rpm and baseline tests.  Both are run "by hand", neither is run by Travis. 
Bumped Fedora 26 to Fedora 27 in the baseline test and corrected an image name.  Added clean-up of images and containers in Buildah with the rpm test before it kicks off the baseline tests.

comments.body: Going to close and reopen this one.  Tests shouldn't trip up for this PR.

@jlebon any thoughts on what's happening with the Red Hat CI on this one?  The scripts in this PR are not being called by CI, they should be treated like documentation.  Plus the Docker command that's failing isn't in them?
Hmm, might be a registry flake.
Green lights, you must have the magic touch @jlebon , Thanks!
All green again, ready for a merge in case your merge finger is twitchy @rhatdan
Homu seems to be hosed up.  merging manually.
